sys_script.name: CityMed - Repeat Fault Warning

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_8d2a2ed2938a83101aa3f18ddd03d6f7
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2057380_cityme_0_equipment_fault</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>CityMed - Repeat Fault Warning</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {

    var thirtyDaysAgo = new GlideDateTime();
    thirtyDaysAgo.addDaysUTC(-30);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('x_2057380_cityme_0_equipment_fault');
    ga.addQuery('equipment_id', current.equipment_id);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', thirtyDaysAgo);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
	

    if (ga.next()) {

        var count = parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'));

        if (count > 3) {

            var gr = new GlideRecord('x_citymed_itsm_equipment_fault');

            if (gr.get(current.sys_id)) {

                gr.work_notes =
                    "Warning: This equipment has logged " +
                    count +
                    " faults in the last 30 days. Consider scheduling preventive maintenance.";

                gr.update();
            }
        }
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-15 11:29:22</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>8d2a2ed2938a83101aa3f18ddd03d6f7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CityMed - Repeat Fault Warning</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="CityMed Project" source="x_2057380_cityme_0">e58f9d3293b10b101aa3f18ddd03d68a</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="CityMed Project">e58f9d3293b10b101aa3f18ddd03d68a</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_8d2a2ed2938a83101aa3f18ddd03d6f7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-19 10:07:30</sys_updated_on><template/><when>async_always</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=8d2a2ed2938a83101aa3f18ddd03d6f7"/></record_update>
